_meta.derivation: CLI-layer rejection fixture; engine never invoked. Per plan: D-15 hides RefiCashflow construction inside the engine, so the CLI round-trip variant of the SC-4 sign-validator rejection uses Rate type-bound violation as the trigger. The model-layer SC-4 sign-validator construction-time rejection is exercised separately by tests/test_refinance.py::test_refi_cashflow_outflow_positive_rejected (Plan 06-01).
_meta.citation: ROADMAP Phase 6 SC-4 (CLI-layer 6-key envelope on stderr for ValidationError-class boundary surfaces); REFI-08 anchor for round-trip behavior. WR-02 closure: 6-key envelope keyset = {type, loc, msg, input, url, ctx}.
